response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates deep full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools, with strong experience in AI-agent infrastructure, testing, and scalable systems — aligning well with the role. His open-source contributions and architectural versatility are significant strengths, though his resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java, and German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in skills or experience
Kotlin/Java experience is implied but not clearly documented in relevant context
Basic German proficiency may hinder seamless collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
